reviews.review_description:
Absolutely mind blowing. The best VR app I've seen in a long time. If ever.
This app should win an Oscar.

I always wanted to be on the RCMPolice St Roch, while went on a voyage in the early 1940s through the Northwest Passage. This app has St Roch vibes from the Vancouver Maritime Museum.

Highly rated. Excellent. Top tier.
